name: gluak-claude-kit
description: Daniele Petroselli's personal Claude Code toolkit — skills, agents and helpers tuned to the way Gluak works. Grows over time.

plugins.name: gluak-toolkit
plugins.description: All Gluak skills in one plugin — project bootstrap (`gluak-setup`), portable repo memory (`repo-memory`), and future helpers. Install once, get everything.
